question: Bagaimana cara membuat HorizontalPodAutoscaler yang scale berdasarkan custom metric dari Prometheus?
selection_rationale: SO answer score 15. HPA yaml_gen not covered in existing fixtures (only conceptual + relationship HPA fixtures exist). Custom metrics type uses autoscaling/v2 HorizontalPodAutoscalerSpec.metrics field which is in graph. New coverage for HPA yaml_gen slot.

ground_truth.answer:
apiVersion: autoscaling/v2
kind: HorizontalPodAutoscaler
metadata:
  name: my-app-hpa
  namespace: default
spec:
  scaleTargetRef:
    apiVersion: apps/v1
    kind: Deployment
    name: my-app
  minReplicas: 2
  maxReplicas: 10
  metrics:
    - type: Pods
      pods:
        metric:
          name: http_requests_per_second
        target:
          type: AverageValue
          averageValue: 100m
context: io.k8s.api.autoscaling.v2.HorizontalPodAutoscaler: automatically scales the number of Pods based on observed metrics
io.k8s.api.autoscaling.v2.HorizontalPodAutoscalerSpec: minReplicas, maxReplicas, and metrics define the scaling behavior
io.k8s.api.autoscaling.v2.MetricSpec: type can be Resource, Pods, Object, External, or ContainerResource
